text: To live a healthy life, you should focus on several key areas. First, eat a balanced diet with plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, keeps your body strong and improves your mood. Getting enough sleep each night is also essential—aim for seven to nine hours to help your body recover. Mental health is just as important. Try to reduce stress by taking breaks and spending time with loved ones. Finally, find a good work-life balance. Make time for hobbies and relaxation, not just work. When you combine these habits, you feel healthier and happier.
